partner-headline: Partnerships that turn discovery into relevant demand
partner-intro: AJSEE is where people discover events and plan their free time. We help ticketing partners, promoters, and other relevant brands reach audiences at the moment of inspiration. We build on fair collaboration that respects your customer relationship and your own sales journey.
partner-benefit1-desc: People interested in culture, sport, and travel for experiences.
partner-benefit2-desc: High-quality presentation of your events and offers in a modern and clear environment.
partner-benefit3-desc: We link directly to your sales or reservation system.
partner-benefit4-desc: Transactions and the customer relationship remain fully under your control.
partners-description: Our platform is open to collaboration with cultural institutions, cities, producers and tech partners. Below are examples of typical organizations that can work with us.
partner-success-msg: Thank you for your interest in becoming a partner! We will contact you as soon as possible.
partner-error-msg: Sending failed. Please try again later.
partner-error-company: Please fill in your company or institution name.
partner-honeypot-label: Do not fill in this field (antispam)
